message:
fix: ensure touch targets meet 44px WCAG 2.5.5 minimum (#3738) (#3747)

Add min-h-11 min-w-11 (44px) to cluster lifecycle icon buttons in
ClusterGrid and min-h-11 to compliance table sort buttons in
ComplianceDrillDown for mobile accessibility.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
